description:
Overview:

1. Healthy and soft material, non-toxic, tasteless, will not cause any harm to your pet cat! Protect your cat's claws and your cat will like the feeling of stepping on it.
2. Double-Layer Structure: Double-layer honeycomb litter trapper mat design helps you gather the litter. You just need to pick up the litter box mat and all the litter falls through. And then dump it back in the litter box for reuse.
3. Waterproof & Urine Proof Cat Box Mat: Bottom layer is waterproof and also slip-resistant which will not allow any liquid to go through and is easy to move. Protect your hardwood floors and carpets from nasty urine stains. Prevent the cat's urine from getting everywhere.


Product information:
Specifications: 30*30CM,30*45CM,40*50CM,45*60CM,55*75CM,65 * 80CM
Color: black, gray, blue, pink, brown
Applicable occasions for gifts: weddings, parties
Material: EVA
Applicable object: Cat
Category: pet bed, Cage


Packing list: 
Mat*1


Product Image:
